lines.en: Mou fushimegachi na kinou nante iranai
Kyou korekara hajimaru watashi no densetsu
Kitto otoko ga mireba
Tawai no nai ayamachi kurikaeshite demo
Unubore toka shitatakasa mo hitsuyou
Sou hajirai nante toki niwa jama na dake
Kiyoku tadashiku ikiru dake dewa taikutsu
Ippo wo ookiku
Susumou mainichi yume ni mukatte
Bakuzen to ja nai itoteki ni
Nakitai toki niwa namida nagashite
Stress tamenai
Honno sasai na kotoba ni kizutsuita
Dakedo amai mono tabete shiawase yo
Kimagure ni tsukiau no mo taihen ne
Warui to wa omou kedo yamerarenai
(Interlude)
Atarashii mono daisuki kuwashii no
Kigen toru niwa nani yori present
Otoko dewa taerarenai itami demo
Onna nara taeraremasu tsuyoi kara
(Outro)
